title: Update docs/tutorials/mac_win_client.md
body:
### Issue Description

Our "Let's run Podman on Mac and Windows" documentation is VERY out of date - to the point where I think it predates `podman machine`. We do have separate tutorials for both Mac and Windows, but the docs/tutorials/mac_win_client.md tutorial - which is still quite commonly viewed - is focused on the extremely-uncommon case of connecting to a remote server, not using `podman machine`. We should retain the existing docs in there - they are useful - but we need to expand this with more details on using `podman machine`, even if it is just linking to the Windows/Mac tutorials

### Steps to reproduce the issue

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.

This appears to have been addressed by e39781979ef594d02ce9df6bd8ae40e17c3089d3, which added a 'Choosing a backend' section and links the guide back to the recommended install docs.

Can this be closed, or is there still additional macOS/Windows tutorial work expected here?
